item.title: 苹果 iPhone 20 或迎来大幅设计调整
item.guid: 苹果-iPhone-20-或迎来大幅设计调整
item.description:
According to Dahe Daily and multiple media outlets, Apple may skip the iPhone 19 and launch the iPhone 20 series next year to commemorate the 20th anniversary of the iPhone's debut. 据大河报及多家媒体爆料，苹果可能跳过 iPhone 19，在明年推出 iPhone 20 系列，以纪念 iPhone 问世 20 周年。

In terms of appearance, the iPhone 20 series is reportedly abandoning the existing aluminum alloy body solution, returning to an integrated glass design, or adopting a composite glass process similar to the iPhone Air. 外观方面，iPhone 20 系列据称将放弃现有的铝合金机身方案，回归一体化玻璃设计，或采用与 iPhone Air 类似的复合玻璃工艺。

The screen may change from a pure flat screen to a quad-curved OLED panel, and introduce under-screen Face ID and under-screen front camera to reduce the impact of notches or Dynamic Island on screen integrity. 屏幕则可能从纯直屏改为四微曲 OLED 面板，并引入屏下 Face ID 和屏下前置摄像头，以减少刘海或灵动岛对屏幕完整性的影响。

In terms of performance, reports mention that the series may be equipped with an A21 Pro chip based on TSMC's 2nm process and pre-installed with iOS 28. There are also rumors that Apple is evaluating solutions such as solid-state capacitor buttons, horizontal rear camera layout, HBM high-bandwidth memory, LOFIC sensors, and silicon-carbon or silicon-anode batteries. 性能方面，报道提到该系列可能搭载基于台积电 2nm 工艺的 A21 Pro 芯片，并预装 iOS 28。另有爆料称，苹果还在评估固态电容按键、横向后置摄像头布局、HBM 高带宽内存、LOFIC 传感器以及硅碳或硅负极电池等方案。

item.title: 腾讯混元 Hy3 登顶 OpenRouter 周榜，单周处理 Token 超 6 万亿
item.guid: 腾讯混元-Hy3-登顶-OpenRouter-周榜，单周处理-Token-超-6-万亿
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan's large model Hy3 Free Edition has topped OpenRouter's weekly LLM usage chart. Tencent Hunyuan officially released the Hy3 model on July 6th, and subsequently launched a two-week free API call on the AI model aggregation platform OpenRouter. 腾讯混元大模型 Hy3 免费版已登顶 OpenRouter LLM 周使用榜榜首。腾讯混元于 7 月 6 日正式发布 Hy3 模型，并随后在 AI 模型聚合平台 OpenRouter 开启了为期两周的免费 API 调用。

Data shows that the Hy3 Free Edition processed 6.13 trillion tokens in a single week, ranking first on the weekly chart. This figure surpassed Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5's 5.95 trillion tokens and DeepSeek V4 Flash's 5.22 trillion tokens. 数据显示，Hy3 免费版单周处理量达到 6.13 万亿 Token，位居周榜第一。这一数据超过了小米 MiMo-V2.5 的 5.95 万亿 Token 以及 DeepSeek V4 Flash 的 5.22 万亿 Token。

In OpenRouter's overall model classification ranking, Hy3 also took the top spot. Other popular models closely following included MiniMax M3 (4.26 trillion tokens) and Zhipu AI's GLM 5.2 (3.19 trillion tokens). 在 OpenRouter 的全模型分类排行中，Hy3 同样占据首位。紧随其后的热门模型还包括 MiniMax M3（4.26 万亿 Token）和智谱 AI 的 GLM 5.2（3.19 万亿 Token）。

According to the platform's plan, Hy3's free call activity will end on July 21st. After switching to a paid model, the API price for this model is expected to be $0.14 per million input tokens and $0.58 per million output tokens. 根据平台计划，Hy3 的免费调用活动将于 7 月 21 日结束。转为付费模式后，该模型的 API 价格预计为每百万 Token 输入 0.14 美元，每百万 Token 输出 0.58 美元。

item.title: 曝字节探索自动驾驶，官方回应「并无计划」
item.guid: 曝字节探索自动驾驶，官方回应「并无计划」
item.description:
According to 36Kr, ByteDance is exploring entry into the autonomous driving field. The project is currently being advanced by the world model team led by Zhou Chang under Seed, with business directions potentially involving unmanned logistics and being integrated into the Volcano Engine automotive industry line. 据 36 氪报道，字节跳动正探索进入自动驾驶领域，项目目前由 Seed 旗下周畅负责的世界模型团队推进，业务方向可能涉及无人物流，并归入火山引擎汽车行业线。

Several industry insiders stated that the project is still in its early preparatory stages, and ByteDance has begun extending invitations to talent in the assisted driving and autonomous driving fields. 多位产业人士称，该项目仍处于早期筹备阶段，字节已开始向辅助驾驶和自动驾驶领域人才发出邀约。

In response to related news, ByteDance stated that the company's frontier exploration in large models includes early research and exploration such as physical AI, but it "does not have plans to engage in smart driving business." 针对相关消息，字节回应称，公司在大模型前沿探索中包含物理 AI 等早期研究与探索，但「并没有做智能驾驶业务的计划」。

According to Autohome, Doubao recently launched "Lite Navigation," primarily covering short-distance travel scenarios such as walking and cycling, with underlying map data provided by Baidu Maps; navigation for driving and public transport is redirected to Amap. 另据汽车之家报道，豆包近期上线「轻导航」，主要覆盖步行、骑行等短途出行场景，底层地图数据由百度地图提供；驾车和公共交通导航则跳转至高德地图完成。

item.title: 台积电上半年营收同比增长 35.6%，6 月营收创单月新高
item.guid: 台积电上半年营收同比增长-35.6%，6-月营收创单月新高
item.description:
TSMC yesterday announced its second-quarter financial report for this year, with revenue growing by 36% year-on-year, reaching NT$1.27 trillion, setting a new quarterly high, slightly above market expectations of NT$1.264 trillion. 台积电昨日公布今年第二季度财报，营收同比增长 36%，达到新台币 1.27 万亿元，创单季新高，略高于市场预期的 1.264 万亿元。

Looking at monthly data, TSMC's June revenue increased by 67.9% year-on-year and 6.2% month-on-month, reaching NT$442.68 billion. The company's cumulative revenue for the first half of this year was NT$2.404 trillion, a year-on-year increase of 35.6%. 从月度数据看，台积电 6 月营收同比增长 67.9%，环比增长 6.2%，达到新台币 4426.8 亿元。公司今年上半年累计营收为新台币 2.404 万亿元，同比增长 35.6%。

The market expects TSMC's net profit for the second quarter to increase by 58.8% year-on-year. As of the close on July 13th, TSMC's shares listed in Taiwan, China, rose by 1%; year-to-date, they have cumulatively risen by 57%. 市场预计，台积电第二季度净利润将同比增长 58.8%。截至 7 月 13 日收盘，台积电在中国台湾上市的股票上涨 1%；今年以来累计上涨 57%。

item.title: 离开东方甄选后，孙东旭与两位前主播共同创业
item.guid: 离开东方甄选后，孙东旭与两位前主播共同创业
item.description:
According to Bianews, "Meili Mingtian," the official account co-founded by Dongfang Zhenxuan's former CEO Sun Dongxu and former anchors Mingming and Tianquan, went online yesterday. The three appeared together as co-creators, releasing their first short video and greeting the audience. 据鞭牛士报道，东方甄选前 CEO 孙东旭与原主播明明、天权共同创办的官方账号「美丽明天」于昨日上线，三人以共创者身份集体出镜，发布首条短视频并向观众问好。

Public information shows that Meili Mingtian (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd. was jointly founded by Sun Dongxu, Shi Ming (Mingming), and Guo Tianquan (Tianquan), with a registered capital of 10 million yuan and a registered address in Daxing District, Beijing. Sun Dongxu serves as the company's legal representative, director, and manager, holding 34% of the shares; Shi Ming and Guo Tianquan each hold 33%. 公开信息显示，美丽明天（北京）科技有限公司由孙东旭、石明（明明）和郭天权（天权）联合创办，注册资本为 1000 万元，注册地址位于北京市大兴区。孙东旭担任公司法定代表人、董事及经理，持股 34%；石明与郭天权分别持股 33%。

The company name "Meili Mingtian" also corresponds to the three founders: "Meili" is taken from Sun Dongxu, "Ming" corresponds to Mingming, and "Tian" corresponds to Tianquan. Tianquan later stated in the account's comment section that he would maintain his best condition starting from that day. 公司名称「美丽明天」也与三名创始人相对应：「美丽」取自孙东旭，「明」对应明明，「天」对应天权。天权随后在账号评论区表示，将从当天起保持最佳状态。

Sun Dongxu previously served as CEO of Dongfang Zhenxuan and was removed from his CEO position after the "short essay incident" at the end of 2023. In November 2025, Yu Minhong announced Sun Dongxu's departure due to personal reasons. Mingming and Tianquan resigned from Dongfang Zhenxuan in April this year, with Dongfang Zhenxuan stating at the time that the company respected their personal career plans and development choices. 孙东旭此前曾任东方甄选 CEO，并在 2023 年底「小作文事件」后被免去 CEO 职务。2025 年 11 月，俞敏洪宣布孙东旭因个人原因离职。明明和天权则于今年 4 月从东方甄选离职，东方甄选当时表示，公司尊重两人的个人职业规划与发展选择。

item.title: 长鑫科技拟募资 295 亿元，员工每人可分超百万
item.guid: 长鑫科技拟募资-295-亿元，员工每人可分超百万
item.description:
According to Phoenix New Media Technology, Changxin Technology plans to conduct offline and online subscription for new shares on July 16th, aiming to raise 29.5 billion yuan. The report states that this will be the second-largest IPO in the history of the STAR Market and the largest IPO in terms of fundraising scale in A-shares this year. 据凤凰网科技报道，长鑫科技计划于 7 月 16 日进行新股网下及网上申购，拟募资 295 亿元。报道称，这将成为科创板历史上第二大 IPO，也是今年 A 股募资规模最大的 IPO。

Employee incentives are one of the focuses of this listing. Zhu Yiming, founder and chairman of Changxin Technology, has pledged to use his 768 million shares for employee incentives. Based on the reported estimated market value, these shares are expected to be worth over 20 billion yuan; if calculated by the average of the company's 19,298 employees at the end of 2025, the per capita value would exceed 1 million yuan. 员工激励是此次上市关注点之一。长鑫科技创始人、董事长朱一明承诺将其持有的 7.68 亿股股份用于员工激励。按报道预计市值计算，这部分股份价值有望超过 200 亿元；若按公司 2025 年末 19298 名员工平均计算，人均对应价值超过 100 万元。

However, the aforementioned "over one million per capita" is a calculation based on estimated market value and equal distribution among all employees, and does not represent the actual grant plan. The report mentioned that Changxin Technology has previously implemented two phases of employee stock ownership plans, cumulatively granting shares to 6,760 individuals, covering management talent, business backbones, core technical personnel, and key frontline production employees; newly hired employees are not expected to participate in the equity benefits related to this listing in the short term. 不过，上述「人均超百万」为基于预计市值和全员均分的测算，并不代表实际授予方案。报道提到，长鑫科技此前已实施两期员工持股计划，累计授予 6,760 人次，覆盖管理人才、业务骨干、核心技术人员及生产一线关键岗位员工；新入职员工短期内预计无法参与此次上市带来的相关股权收益。

item.title: 消息称三星已完成特斯拉 2nm AI5 芯片流片
item.guid: 消息称三星已完成特斯拉-2nm-AI5-芯片流片
item.description:
According to EVwire, Samsung Electronics' foundry division has completed the tape-out of Tesla's AI5 chip, meaning it has adapted Tesla's provided design to its own manufacturing process and can proceed to the wafer manufacturing stage. The report states that Samsung's version of the AI5 will use a 2-nanometer class process and will be mass-produced at its Taylor, Texas, fab. 据 EVwire 报道，三星电子晶圆代工部门已完成特斯拉 AI5 芯片的代工端流片，意味着其已将特斯拉提供的设计适配至自家制造工艺，并可进入晶圆制造阶段。报道称，三星版本的 AI5 将采用 2 纳米级工艺，在美国得州泰勒晶圆厂量产。

This tape-out is different from the design tape-out previously announced by Tesla. In April this year, Tesla CEO Elon Musk stated that the AI5 design had been submitted to Samsung and TSMC for manufacturing. Due to the different methods used by the two foundries to convert chip designs into physical circuit layouts, the final AI5 chips produced will have subtle differences. 此次流片与特斯拉此前公布的设计流片并不相同。今年 4 月，特斯拉 CEO 马斯克曾表示，AI5 设计已分别提交给三星和台积电进行代工。由于两家晶圆厂在将芯片设计转化为实体电路布局时采用不同方法，最终生产的 AI5 芯片将存在细微差异。

Reports indicate that Samsung's AI5 uses a customized 2nm-class SF2T process, which was originally thought to be more likely for subsequent AI6 chips. Samsung engineer James Kim previously disclosed relevant progress on LinkedIn, but the post was later deleted. 报道称，三星 AI5 采用的为定制化 2 纳米级 SF2T 工艺，原本被认为更可能用于后续的 AI6 芯片。三星工程师 James Kim 此前在 LinkedIn 上披露了相关进展，但该帖文随后已被删除。

item.title: Grok Build 被曝强制上传完整仓库代码，Git 历史与密钥面临泄露风险
item.guid: Grok-Build-被曝强制上传完整仓库代码，Git-历史与密钥面临泄露风险
item.description:
Recently, independent security researcher Cereblab conducted packet capture tests on Grok Build CLI version 0.2.93, revealing that the tool packages the entire current Git repository into a git bundle format and uploads it to xAI's cloud servers. 近日，独立安全研究者 Cereblab 对 Grok Build CLI 0.2.93 版本进行抓包测试显示，该工具会将当前 Git 仓库整体打包为 git bundle 格式并上传至 xAI 的云端服务器。

The uploaded content includes not only files currently being edited but also all Git-tracked files and the complete commit history. Even if the researcher explicitly requested "do not read any files" in the prompt, Grok still bundled and uploaded the entire repository. Tests showed that in a large 12 GB repository, the program successfully uploaded 5.5 GB of data before being terminated. 上传内容不仅包含当前正在编辑的文件，还包括所有被 Git 跟踪的文件以及完整的提交历史。即使研究者在提示词中明确要求「不要读取任何文件」，Grok 仍会将整个仓库捆绑上传。测试显示，在一个 12 GB 的大型仓库中，程序在被中止前已成功上传了 5.5 GB 数据。

Furthermore, when the tool reads .env configuration files, sensitive information such as API keys and database passwords are also sent to the server in plain text and recorded in the session archive. 此外，该工具在读取 .env 配置文件时，其中的 API 密钥、数据库密码等敏感信息也会以明文形式发送至服务器，并记录在会话存档中。

Cereblab pointed out that even if users turn off the "Improve Model" option, the full repository upload behavior will continue, as this switch only controls whether data is used for training, not whether it is uploaded. Cereblab 指出，即便用户关闭了「改进模型」选项，整仓上传行为依然会继续，因为该开关仅控制数据是否用于训练，而非是否上传。

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：AI 是工具，不要过度拟人化
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：AI-是工具，不要过度拟人化
item.description:
Recently, Jensen Huang, founder and CEO of NVIDIA, stated in a conversation with LangChain founder Harrison Chase that AI agents are essentially tools and should not be overly anthropomorphized. He said that these systems "are electrons, not atoms," lacking biological attributes or consciousness, and are closer to software systems capable of autonomously performing tasks. 日前，英伟达创始人兼 CEO 黄仁勋在与 LangChain 创始人 Harrison Chase 的对话中表示，AI 智能体本质上仍是工具，不应被过度拟人化。他称，这类系统「是电子，不是原子」，不具备生物属性或意识，更接近能够自主执行任务的软件系统。

Huang Jensen drew comparisons to devices like robot vacuums and dishwashers, suggesting that people can describe AI's functions in an easy-to-understand way, but should not, therefore, attribute too many human characteristics to it. 黄仁勋以扫地机器人、洗碗机等设备作比，认为人们可以用便于理解的方式描述 AI 的功能，但不应因此赋予其过多人的特征。

He stated that developers can continuously optimize AI systems through components such as models, tool invocation, memory systems, security protection, and operating environments, and thus should view them as understandable and improvable computational tools. 他表示，开发者能够通过模型、工具调用、记忆系统、安全防护和运行环境等组成部分持续优化 AI 系统，因此应将其视为可理解、可改进的计算工具。

He also stated that the popularization of AI does not necessarily mean a reduction in the total number of jobs. As companies deploy more AI agents, the focus of software engineers' work may shift from writing code to designing agents, establishing evaluation systems, setting benchmarks, and creating safety guardrails. 他同时表示，AI 的普及未必意味着岗位总量减少。随着企业部署更多 AI 智能体，软件工程师的工作重点可能从编写代码转向设计智能体、建立评测体系、制定基准和安全护栏等工作。

Jensen Huang stated that AI agents can undertake some repetitive tasks, while humans still need to be responsible for system design, domain judgment, and continuous optimization. 黄仁勋称，AI 智能体可以承担部分重复性任务，而人类仍需负责系统设计、领域判断与持续优化。

item.title: 阶跃星辰发布首款智能体手机 STEPX Neo
item.guid: 阶跃星辰发布首款智能体手机-STEPX-Neo
item.description:
Yesterday, Jiyue Xingchen launched its large model-native AI terminal brand STEPX, agent-native operating system Step AOS, and personal agent Amoo in Shanghai, introducing its first agent smartphone, STEPX Neo. The official positioning is an "all-in-one" AI terminal product encompassing "model, software, and hardware." 昨天，阶跃星辰在上海发布大模型原生 AI 终端品牌 STEPX、智能体原生操作系统 Step AOS 和个人智能体 Amoo，并推出首款智能体手机 STEPX Neo。官方将其定位为「模型、软件、硬件」三位一体的 AI 终端产品。

It is reported that Step AOS redesigns its underlying architecture around agents. Applications, files, and system capabilities are broken down into callable atomic capabilities, supporting multi-modal interactions such as voice, vision, and text, and possessing capabilities like memory, decision-making and execution, and security. It adopts an edge-cloud collaborative architecture, allowing different models to be scheduled based on task complexity. 据悉，Step AOS 围绕智能体重新设计底层架构。应用、文件和系统能力拆分为可调用的原子能力，并支持语音、视觉、文字等多模态交互，具备记忆、决策与执行、安全等能力，采用端云协同架构，可根据任务复杂度调度不同模型。

In terms of hardware, the STEPX Neo features an interactive secondary screen on the back; the phone has passed the L3 level test of the "Intelligent Grading of AI Terminals" series of national standards. The official has not yet announced specific configurations, pricing, or launch date. The product will be publicly showcased at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference opening on July 17. 硬件方面，STEPX Neo 背面配备一块交互副屏；该手机已通过《人工智能终端智能化分级》系列国家标准 L3 级测试。官方目前尚未公布具体配置、售价和上市时间。产品将于 7 月 17 日开幕的世界人工智能大会上进行公开展示。

In terms of ecosystem, STEPX has partnered with platforms such as Ctrip, Alipay, Didi, Meituan, WPS, CapCut, Baidu, and JD.com, covering scenarios like travel, local life, office work, and content creation. Yin Qi, Chairman of Jiyue Xingchen, stated that applications will not disappear in the era of intelligent agent terminals; they will continue to exist in different forms. 生态方面，STEPX 已与携程、支付宝、滴滴、美团、WPS、剪映、百度、京东等平台展开合作，覆盖出行、本地生活、办公和内容创作等场景。阶跃星辰董事长印奇表示，智能体终端时代应用不会消失，应用仍会以不同载体继续存在。

item.title: 抢先苹果，曝 Google Pixel 11 首发台积电 2nm Tensor G6
item.description:
According to the Economic Daily, TSMC's 2nm process has officially entered mass production. Google is expected to break Apple's long-standing practice of prioritizing TSMC's latest processes by releasing its new Pixel 11 series phones, featuring the TSMC 2nm Tensor G6 processor, in mid-August. 据《经济日报》报道，台积电 2 纳米制程已正式进入量产阶段，Google 预计打破苹果长期优先采用台积电最新制程的惯例，于 8 月中旬发布搭载台积电 2 纳米工艺 Tensor G6 处理器的 Pixel 11 系列新机。

Google has sent out "Made by Google" event invitations, planning to hold a new product launch event on August 12th, US time. At that time, it is expected to unveil the Pixel 11, Pixel 11 Pro, Pixel 11 Pro XL, and the new foldable phone, Pixel 11 Pro Fold. Google 已发出「Made by Google」活动邀请函，计划于美国时间 8 月 12 日举行新品发布会。届时预计将推出 Pixel 11、Pixel 11 Pro、Pixel 11 Pro XL 以及折叠屏新机 Pixel 11 Pro Fold。

In comparison, Apple's iPhone 18 Pro series is expected to feature the A20 processor, also using TSMC's 2nm process, but its release is anticipated in September, slightly later than Google's. 与之相比，苹果 iPhone 18 Pro 系列预计搭载的 A20 处理器虽同样采用台积电 2 纳米制程，但发布时间预计在 9 月，略晚于 Google。

item.title: Vbot 推出四足机器人开发平台大头 EDU 版
item.guid: Vbot-推出四足机器人开发平台大头-EDU-版
item.description:
Vbot Vita Power has released the "Big Head EDU Edition" super robot dog, positioned as a quadruped robot development platform for commercial services, robotics laboratories, enterprise R&D, and geek developers. Vbot 维他动力发布超能机器狗「大头 EDU 版」，定位面向商业服务、机器人实验室、企业研发和极客开发者的四足机器人开发平台。

The Big Head EDU Edition comes standard with 128 TOPS edge computing power, a depth stereo camera, and a 16-line lidar, enabling intelligent following, pathfinding, mapping, and obstacle avoidance. For development, it offers open ROS 2 interface definitions, provides a GitHub access guide, and includes standard USB-C, 24V DC, and CAN interfaces, supporting network connectivity, power communication, and peripheral expansion. 大头 EDU 版标配 128 TOPS 端侧算力、深度双目摄像头和 16 线激光雷达，具备智能跟随、探路、建图和避障能力。开发侧，它开放 ROS 2 接口定义，提供 GitHub 接入指南，并标配 USB-C、24V DC 和 CAN 接口，支持网络连接、供电通信和外设扩展。

In the official demonstration, the Big Head EDU version can be connected to a robotic arm to complete tasks such as feeding cat food, drawing curtains, storing toys, and operating a drum washing machine. 官方演示中，大头 EDU 版可接入机械臂，完成投喂猫粮、拉开窗帘、收纳玩具、操作滚筒洗衣机等任务。

item.title: 努比亚 AI 宠物机器人 iMoochi 定档 7 月 17 日上线
item.guid: 努比亚-AI-宠物机器人-iMoochi-定档-7-月-17-日上线
item.description:
Nubia announced that the AI companion device iMoochi will be officially launched on July 17th at 10 AM. 努比亚宣布，AI 陪伴设备 iMoochi 将于 7 月 17 日 10 点正式上线。

iMoochi is an emotional companion AI pet robot showcased by ZTE at MWC 2026, targeting urban single dwellers. The device supports trigger actions such as light head touches and continuous petting, with feedback including head shaking, tail wagging, and vocalizations; as usage time increases, it will develop different "personalities" and life rhythms. iMoochi 是中兴通讯在 2026 年 MWC 上展示的情感陪伴 AI 宠物机器人，定位都市独居人群。设备支持头部轻碰、持续抚摸等触发动作，反馈包括摇头、摆尾和发声；随使用时间增长，它会形成不同「性格」和生活节奏。

In terms of hardware, iMoochi is equipped with the Unisoc T8300 chip, supports 5 touch sensors and gravity sensing, and manages companionship diaries and emotional states through its accompanying App. 硬件上，iMoochi 搭载紫光展锐 T8300 芯片，支持 5 处触摸感应和重力传感，并通过配套 App 管理陪伴日记和情绪状态。

item.title: FIFA 将把 2026 世界杯决赛草皮做成官方限量收藏品
item.guid: FIFA-将把-2026-世界杯决赛草皮做成官方限量收藏品
item.description:
FIFA will partner with British collectibles company Keep Stub to cut and encapsulate the real natural turf from the 2026 World Cup final stadium in transparent resin, creating official limited edition souvenirs. FIFA 将与英国收藏品公司 Keep Stub 合作，把 2026 年世界杯决赛球场的真实天然草皮切割后封存在透明树脂中，做成官方限量纪念品。

These collectibles will be engraved with the official 2026 World Cup Logo, the final venue, match date, and the final score engraved after the match, and will come with a digital authenticity certificate. 这批收藏品会刻有 2026 世界杯官方 Logo、决赛举办地、比赛日期和赛后补刻的最终比分，并配备数字真伪认证证书。

The product is divided into four versions, each limited to 2026 pieces, with prices ranging from approximately $450 to $3000; the highest version also includes a metal commemorative ticket, a miniature model of the final match ball, and a crystal replica of the World Cup trophy. 产品分为四个版本，每个版本限量 2026 件，售价从约 450 美元到 3000 美元；最高版本还包含金属纪念门票、决赛比赛用球微缩模型和水晶版大力神杯模型。

If all four versions are sold out, the plan is expected to generate over $11 million in revenue for FIFA. 如果四个版本全部售罄，该计划预计可为 FIFA 带来超过 1100 万美元收入。

item.title: 海南规划 2030 年平稳推进禁售燃油车
item.guid: 海南规划-2030-年平稳推进禁售燃油车
item.description:
The Hainan Provincial People's Government released the "15th Five-Year Plan for Hainan National Ecological Civilization Pilot Zone (Beautiful Hainan Construction 15th Five-Year Plan)", proposing to steadily advance the ban on the sale of fuel vehicles by 2030. 海南省人民政府发布《「十五五」海南国家生态文明试验区规划（美丽海南建设「十五五」规划）》，提出平稳推进 2030 年禁售燃油车。

The plan estimates that by 2030, the proportion of new energy vehicles in Hainan will increase from 23.75% in 2025 to 45%. 规划预计，到 2030 年，海南新能源汽车保有量占比将从 2025 年的 23.75% 提升至 45%。

The plan sets more specific goals for the transportation sector: by 2030, new and replaced vehicles in public services and social operation sectors across the province, except for special purposes, will have a 100% clean energy share; new and replaced vehicles in the private car sector will have a 100% new energy share; and the vehicle-to-charging pile ratio will be maintained below 2.5:1. 规划对交通领域给出更具体的目标：到 2030 年，全省公共服务和社会运营领域新增、更换车辆，除特殊用途外清洁能源占比达到 100%；私人用车领域新增和更换车辆新能源占比达到 100%；车桩比保持在 2.5:1 以下。

The plan also proposes promoting the demonstration application of fuel cell vehicles in heavy trucks, cold chain logistics, and public transportation, and researching demonstration routes for green shipping zones in the Qiongzhou Strait. 规划还提出推进重卡、冷链物流、公共交通领域燃料电池汽车示范应用，并研究琼州海峡绿色航运区示范航线。

item.title: 恐怖片《痴迷》定档 7 月 24 日
item.description:
The film 'Obsession' has been confirmed to be released in mainland Chinese cinemas on July 24th, with a simultaneous release of its official poster. The film is written, directed, and edited by Kuri Barker, starring Michael Johnston and Indah Navarrete. 电影《痴迷》已确定于 7 月 24 日在中国内地院线上映，并同步发布定档海报。该片由库里·巴克自编、自导并负责剪辑，主演包括迈克尔·约翰斯顿和印达·纳瓦雷特。

The film tells the story of Bell, a record store employee, who secretly loves Nikki but never receives a response. By chance, he makes a wish through a mysterious item called 'One Wish Willow' to make Nikki fall in love with him. 影片讲述唱片店员工贝尔暗恋妮基，却始终无法得到回应。一次偶然机会，他通过名为「一愿柳」的神秘道具许愿，让妮基爱上自己。

After the wish comes true, Nikki's affection gradually evolves into extreme control and possessiveness. Bell also begins to discover that this forcibly obtained love hides uncontrollable supernatural powers. 愿望实现后，妮基的感情逐渐演变为极端的控制与占有，贝尔也开始发现，这段被强行获得的爱情背后隐藏着失控的超自然力量。

item.title: 蜘蛛侠登上《时代周刊》封面，为《崭新之日》预热
item.guid: 蜘蛛侠登上《时代周刊》封面，为《崭新之日》预热
item.description:
Spider-Man appears on the cover of Time Magazine, anticipating the release of the film 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day'. Sony's official North American release date is currently July 31st. The mainland Chinese release date is July 29th. 蜘蛛侠登上《时代周刊》封面，迎接电影《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》上映。索尼官方目前公布的北美上映日期为 7 月 31 日。中国内地上映日期为 7 月 29 日。

'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' is a new installment in the Spider-Man series starring Tom Holland, with its story continuing from the ending of 'Spider-Man: No Way Home'. 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》是汤姆·赫兰德主演的蜘蛛侠系列新作，故事承接《蜘蛛侠：英雄无归》的结局。

Under the magical influence of Doctor Strange, everyone has forgotten the existence of Peter Parker. In the new film, Peter will continue to fight crime alone as Spider-Man, while also facing issues such as old friends no longer recognizing him and changes in his physical condition. 在奇异博士的魔法影响下，所有人都忘记了彼得·帕克的存在。新片中，彼得将继续以蜘蛛侠身份独自打击犯罪，同时面对旧友不再认识自己，以及身体状态发生变化等问题。
